creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
gdal fails to build with WITH_GRASS, WITH_PGSQL, WITH_PHP, WITH_ECW and WITH_RUBY, and has incomplete plist for WITH_PERL and WITH_PYTHON.

See http://people.freebsd.org/~amdmi3/gdal/ for logs.

Port maintainer (sunpoet@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
